aniworldLight.title: AniWorld.to Light
aniworldLight.description: Bright anime-inspired colors with vibrant purples and playful accents. Clean, lively, and easy on the eyes.

aniworldDark.title: AniWorld.to Dark
aniworldDark.description: Deep dark surfaces with glowing violet highlights. Perfect for nighttime viewing with a bold anime aesthetic.

stoLight.title: S.TO Light
stoLight.description: Minimal and cinematic with cool blues and soft contrasts. A clean, modern look for daytime browsing.

stoDark.title: S.TO Dark
stoDark.description: Dark, immersive streaming style with cool blue tones. Focused, elegant, and ideal for long watch sessions.

updater.heathDescription: The Health URL is fetched via an HTTP GET request to determine whether an internet connection is available.

alert.title: Delete profile
alert.description: Are you sure you want to delete your profile? All progress and profile-related data cannot be recovered.
